titleStmt.title: SII 5.439: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 439. (A.R. No. 148 of 1894). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . [śrī] komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīcuntarapāṇṭiyatevarkku yāṇṭu patiṉoṉṟāvata ṉetirāmāṇṭi ṉetirāmāṇṭu makaranāyaṟṟu Irupattunālān tiyatiyum Aparapakṣa ttu daśa miyum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Aṉiḻattu nā
ḷ kiḻvempanāṭṭut tirunelvelit tirukkāmakkoṭṭamāṉa kulacekarapurattu nakaratatom Ātiśaṇḍeśvarade varkkup piṭipāṭu paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu miḻalaikkūṟṟattu Aṭumporuṭaiyāṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ Uṭaiyanāyakaṉāṉa viḻuppāta
rāyar Uṭaiyār tirunelveliuṭaiyanāyaṉār koyilil Eḻuntaruḷuvitta Āḷu ṭaiyār Aḻakiyatirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyārkku nitta(n) nivantap palakāyattukku Ittiyatimutal tiruppaṭiyil Utakamākap pū Oṉṟukku Accu Oṉṟaraiyāka Utakam paṇṇiṉa Āṇṭu Oṉṟukku Accu muṉṟu I
vvaccu muṉṟiṉāl patiṉmuṉṟu meṉi tiramam muppattoṉpatu Ittiramam muppattoṉpatum nāṅkaḷ muṉpu nāyaṉār tirunelveliuṭaiyanāyaṉārkku Iṟuttuvarukiṟa Antarāyat tiramattoṭe kūṭṭi paṇṭārikaḷ kaiyyāl taram pārttukkār pāti pacāṉam pātiyākac cantrā
tittavaṟ Iṟuppatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷvatākap piṭupāṭu paṇṇikkuṭuttom tirukkāmakkoṭṭamāṉa kulacekarapurattu nakarattom Ātiśaṇḍeśvarade varkku . Ivai cuntarapāṇṭiyac camaiñcita ṉeḻuttu Ivai cuntarapāṇṭiya vaṇikaccakkaravatti Eḻuttu Ivai Āḻvāṉ ta
mpiyāṉa Aḻakiyapāṇṭiya muventaveḷā ṉeḻuttu Ivai Uṭaiyān tiruvaiyyāṟuṭaiyāṉāṉa Iruneticcakkaravatti yeḻuttu Ivai Ampalavaṉ piccaṉāṉa Ārmaṇṭapāṇṭiyac cilaiceṭṭi yeḻuttu Ivai camaiñcitaṉ ṉeḻuttu Ivai maṇṭalacuvāmi Eḻuttu Ivai civapālaco
ḻac cilaiceṭṭi Eḻuttu Ivai viḷetters have not been incised after this. ti Eḻuttu Ivai vaṇikanārāyaṇac cakkaravatti Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku IvaiRead nakara.takarakkaṇakku kaṇammuruṭaiyā ṉeḻuttu stasi śrī .
Digital edition of SII 5.439 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
